# setProtocol

**Instance Method**

Sets the active protocol to use for communicating with the USB device.

## Declaration

```swift
virtual kern_return_t setProtocol(uint16_t protocol);
```

## Parameters

- **protocol**: The protocol to use for the device. Specify `0` to use the boot protocol or `1` to use the report protocol.

## Return Value

[doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/DriverKit/kIOReturnSuccess] on success, or another value if an error occurs. See [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/DriverKit/error-codes].

## Discussion

At startup, the [doc://com.apple.hiddriverkit/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOUserUSBHostHIDDevice/Start] method sets the protocol to the report protocol.

## Configuring the Device

- **setIdle**: Sets the device’s idle time.
- **setIdlePolicy**: Sets the amount of idle time that must pass before suspending the device.
- **setProperty**: Updates the specified property on the corresponding kernel object.
- **reset**: Resets the USB device.
- **USBIdlePolicyType**: Constants that specify whether to apply the idle policy to an interface or pipe.
